title: Fresh Jamaican Feta Curry
description: A creamy, yeasty curry that balances bold Jamaican spices with tangy feta and sweet coconut milk, perfect for a quick sugar‑free dinner.
instructions: Heat olive oil in a large pan over medium heat.
Add diced onion and sauté until translucent, about 3 minutes.
Stir in minced garlic, grated ginger, curry powder, allspice, thyme, and cinnamon, cooking for 1 minute until fragrant.
Pour in coconut milk and bring the mixture to a gentle simmer, letting the flavors meld for 5 minutes.
Add crumbled feta cheese and stir until the cheese softens and the sauce thickens slightly, about 2 minutes.
Squeeze in lime juice and stir in salsa for a bright finish.
Remove from heat and let the curry sit for 2 minutes to allow the flavors to settle.
Serve hot over steamed rice or with warm flatbread.
Garnish with a sprinkle of fresh thyme if desired.
